use_cases: Building complex multi-section forms with semantic HTML fieldsets
Creating responsive form layouts with horizontal/vertical orientations
Structuring form content with grouped fields and labels
Implementing accessible form components with proper fieldset/legend semantics
Developing admin interfaces and settings pages with organized input sections
ai_summary: A comprehensive form field system component providing FieldSet, FieldLegend, FieldGroup, and field variants with support for vertical, horizontal, and responsive orientations. Built with CVA for consistent styling and uses Tailwind data-slot attributes for flexible composition. Includes semantic HTML elements for accessibility and group/field relationships for styling cascade.
